userBrief: Create one polished original tanuki courier fighter as the reference character for the painterly HD sprite pipeline.
lockedConstraints: Startup, recovery, interruption, and counterplay for every strong action
Character body remains compatible with every supported weapon

Per-state grid, prompt, processing settings, and QC disposition
outOfScope: World building, roster expansion, progression, and monetization
